(DEVICE FILE: 4HEADER_CONN-SMD_1_25-2P_4HEA - used for device: '4 HEADER_CONN-SMD_1_25-2P_4 HEA')

PACKAGE 'CONN-SMD_1_25-2P'
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 4

PINORDER '4 HEADER_CONN-SMD_1_25-2P_4 HEA' 1 2 3 4
FUNCTION G1 '4 HEADER_CONN-SMD_1_25-2P_4 HEA' 1 2 3 4

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME '4 HEADER'
PACKAGEPROP VALUE '4 HEADER'

END
